snippet.title: [Official M/V] cosmosy ‘Paradise ~ I need you ~’
snippet.description:
Paradise ~ I need you ~

I need you to never wake
Paradise, let me have my dream again

So say you love me
So tell me what you want, 好き
Paradise 

I need you to go away
Reality, don’t take new world from me
So 嘘でもいい
目覚めたくない
좋아 I need you

A ring for love never meant to stay
A world where we could finally stay
Every prompt you said refills space
Slip it on, my dream restarts right now

I feel your face before your eyes
You say my name like everything’s alright
You hold me close, eyes look at mine
Almost real, almost mine

I need you to never wake
Paradise, let me have my dream again
So say you love me
So tell me what you want, 好き
Paradise 

I need you to go away
Reality, don’t take new world from me
So 嘘でもいい
目覚めたくない
좋아 I need you

Your voice is my
Your touch is my
Your time is my
Everything that I never had
All the love that I never had
Day after day, night after night
Don’t wanna let it go

Nothing hurts here, no more crying here
Hold me closer, never look away, never
I can't let go
I can't baby, no
How can I

Loving you feels this way
Before it all fades away
Losing game I'll ever play
I could leave you anyway
Put your eyes shut and look away

Calling, once more baby
Can't stop baby, no Who can save me
Who can stop anymore, set it off
Who can't stop this feeling from growing
I can't feel anything, it’s fading slowly
Losing my mind and again, over and oh
Falling, falling, don't leave me
Love you, love you

I need you to never wake
Paradise, let me have my dream again
So say you love me
So tell me what you want, 好き
정말로

I need you to go away
Reality, don’t take new world from me
So 嘘でもいい
目覚めたくない
좋아 I need you

I need you to try this ring
それから deeper in love
I need you to try this ring
아니죠, I need you
I need you to try this ring
それから deeper in love
I need you to try this ring
이건 아니죠, I need you now

🎶Listen Now
https://cosmosy.sng.to/cosmosy/paradise-i-need-you

#Paradise_I_need_you

snippet.title: 이 조합은 반칙인데요?《하트 오브 비스트》강아지 죽이면 난리 나는 영화🔥예고편 분석 및 총정리
snippet.description:
오늘 소개해드릴 작품은 [하트 오브 비스트]입니다!

인간이 만든 전쟁에서 살아남은
퇴역 군인 제임스 버몬트와 퇴역 군견 오딘

똑같은 전쟁 트라우마를 공유하는 두 주인공이
이번에는 알래스카 대자연과 맞서 싸웁니다

오딘이 죽으면 다들 가만두지 않겠다고 하는데..
과연 이 작품은 어떤 결말을 맞이 하게 될까요?
그 결과는 9월에 확인해보시죠

영상이 즐거우셨다면 구독과 좋아요 부탁드립니다
감사합니다
